zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Killegrew於大約1445年出生在英國可瓦爾瑞時，他的父親John Ringwood Killigrew26歲，母親Ellen North27歲。他於1469年與Agnes Thomas在英國英格蘭可瓦爾莫特黑結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1501年6月27日之前在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Killegrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Cornish Killigrew: habitational name from Killigrew in Saint Erme (Cornwall), whose name is apparently from Middle Cornish kelli ‘wood, grove’ + crew ‘weir, stepping stones’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Killegrew was born about 1445, in Penryn, Cornwall, England, his father, John Ringwood Killigrew, was 26 and his mother, Ellen North, was 27. He married Agnes Thomas in 1469, in Merther, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before 27 June 1501, in his hometown.

Il a épousé Agnes Thomas en 1469, à Merther, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 27 juin 1501, dans sa ville natale.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Killegrew(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 코른월 펜린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ringwood Killigrew(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen North(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 머터에서 Agnes Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 6월 27일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.Penryn Manor, Penryn, Saint Gluvias, Cor: ст глувяс' чурч, пенрин, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Killegrew родился около 1445 г. в местности пенрин, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John Ringwood Killigrew было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen North, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Thomas в 1469 г. в местности миртир, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 27 июнь 1501 г. в его родном городе.
